subject: an op ed piece on cal-iso soft price cap

emails.subject: Re: an op ed piece on Cal-ISO soft price cap
emails.subject_base: an op ed piece on Cal-ISO soft price cap
emails.body: Re: an op ed piece on Cal-ISO soft price cap Hi. Got your message. As you know, it's complete meltdown here, so I apologize for not having got back to you sooner. I'll read and get back to you. Deadline?

emails.subject: Re: an op ed piece on Cal-ISO soft price cap

emails.subject: Re: an op ed piece on Cal-ISO soft price cap
emails.subject_base: an op ed piece on Cal-ISO soft price cap
emails.body: Jim wants all my material in by end of the day Friday, so Friday morning is fine. Any FERC action will have to be incorporated into it anyway and we probably won't know the final decision until late Friday. It could be worse. You could be working for Al Gore. Best, Jeannie From: Jeff Dasovich@ENRON on 12/12/2000 01:26 PM Sent by: Jeff Dasovich@ENRON
